specs.title: Home page (/) renders without fatal JS errors
About page (/about) renders without fatal JS errors
Solutions page (/solutions) renders without fatal JS errors
Frameworks page (/frameworks) renders without fatal JS errors
Engagement page (/engagement) renders without fatal JS errors
Contact page (/contact) renders without fatal JS errors
Contact page form inputs are present
theme toggle button is present in the marketing header
clicking theme toggle applies dark class to <html>
theme preference persists across navigation
unauthenticated visit to /portal redirects to /login
login page email and password inputs are visible
login form validates empty submission (button remains enabled)
dashboard renders header navigation elements
dashboard shows user name or email
theme toggle is present in portal header
clicking New Artifact button opens the tool picker dialog
BMC tool shows welcome screen with company name input
entering a company name and Continue enters guided view
view switcher buttons are visible in the BMC header
BMC back-to-dashboard button navigates to /portal
SWOT tool renders all header and tab controls
